body:
## Purpose 
This PR adds the functionality of performing stochastic parameter updates in the form of multiplicative and additive inflation.


## To-do
- [x] Finalize stochastic update for EKI. 
- [x] Port stochastic update to UKI, Sampler , and Sparse EKI.
- [x] ~Make stochastic update the default~.
- [x] Update tests and check examples/. 
- [x] Add documentation
title: Inflation
